raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un teem buhs weenu Ap- 
feggu no Takas-Ahdahm us to 
likt / un wirs to weenu pasillu 
Deḱki isplattiht / un teem buhs 
winnâ neﬀamahm Kahrtis peeliht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pahr to Deewa Maiso 
Galdn / buhs teem arridsan wee- 
nu pasillu Deḱki isplattiht / un 
tur wirſu likt tahs Vtohdas/ un 
tahs Karrotes / un tahs Kannes/ 
un tohs Kaufus/ ar ko tahs apfeg- 
tas tappe / un tai Maisei kas wee- 
numehr tur jaleek / buhs us to 
palift.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un teem buhs weenu Deḱ- 
ki no dahrga Sarkanuina wirs 
to isplattiht / un to paschu ar 
weenu Apfeggu no Takas-Ah- 
dahm apfegt / un winnam tahs 
neﬀamahm Kahrtis peeliht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhs teem weenu pa- 
sillu Deḱki neint / un apfegt to 
spihamu Lukturi / un winna Ef- 
jes-Lukturus / un winna Dsefcha- 
mus Rihkus / un wiffus winna 
Efjes-Trankus / ar ko winneem 
pee ta jakalpo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teem buhs arridsan to 
paschu ar wiﬀeim winna Rih- 
kem kahda Apfeggâ no Takas- 
Ahdahm eelikt / un to us tahm 
neﬀamahm Kahrtim likt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pahr to felta Altari 
's teem weenu pasillu Deḱki
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "tad buhs Naronaim / un winna 
Dehleem nahkt / un to Preekſch- 
welkami/ kas preekſch tahs wiﬀs- 
ſwehtas Weetas karrahs / no- 
neint / un ar to / to Leezibas 
Schkirstu apfegt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teem buhs arridsan wiﬀ- 
fus Ammata Rihkus neint / ar 
ko teem ſivehtâ Weeta jakalpo/ 
un tohs kahdâ pasillâ Deḱki ee- 
likt / un tohs ar weenu Apfeggu 
no Takas-Ahdahm apfegt/ un us 
tahm neﬀamahm Kahrtim likt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un teem buhs tohs Pelnuß 
no ta Altara flanziht / un weenu 
Purpura Deḱki wirs to isplat- 
tiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un teem buhs us to wiﬀus 
winnâ Rihkus likt/ ar ko teem pee 
winnâ jakalpo/ tohs Efjes-Trau- 
kus / tahs Dakſchas / tahs Lahp- 
ſtas / un tohs flazzijamus Trau- 
kus / wiﬀus Altara Rihkus / un 
teem buhs wirs to weenu Apfeg- 
gu no Takas-Ahdahm isplattiht/ 
un winna neﬀamahm Kahrtis pee- 
likt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu Naronâ un win- 
na Dehli tohs Apfeggus no tahs 
ſwehtas Weetas/ un wiﬀus Rih- 
kus tahs ſivehtas Weetas / kad 
tas Lehgeris zeltahs/ irr pabeigu- 
ſchi taiſiht/ tad buhs pehz to teem 
Raita Dehleem nahkt/ un to nest/ 
bet teem ne buhs to Swehtu ais- 
kahrt / ka tee ne mirſt / ſchabs irr 
kaata Dehtu Nastas / pee tahs 
Su-eefchanas Telts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Felezars/ Naronâ ta 
Preestera Dehts/ laid usranga us 
ta Luktura Efji / un us to janu 
Smarchas SahliRwehpinaſcha-
nu /
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "isplattiht / un fo ar weenu Ap- 
feggu no Takas-Ahdahm apfegt/ 
un winna neﬀamahm Kahrtis pee- 
likt.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
